description_long: This object is a stylized coconut palm tree with a tall, slightly curved trunk that is textured with horizontal bands of lighter and darker brown. The trunk supports a dense crown of long, arching fronds that radiate outward in all directions. The fronds are bright green with lighter green highlights along the edges and central veins, giving them a vibrant, almost glowing appearance. The leaves are narrow, elongated, and finely segmented, creating a feathery texture. No individual coconuts are visible among the fronds, and the base of the trunk is slightly thicker than the upper sections. The overall appearance is lush and tropical, suitable for decorative placement in parks or urban green spaces.
description: A stylized coconut palm tree with a curved, banded trunk and a dense crown of bright green, feathery fronds. The tree has a vibrant, tropical look with no visible coconuts.
description_view_0: The palm tree is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the full spread of the fronds and the upper part of the trunk.
description_view_1: This view highlights the curvature of the trunk and the radial arrangement of the fronds, with the trunk extending more prominently to the right.
description_view_2: The palm tree's trunk appears more upright, and the fronds are seen fanning out with clear segmentation and bright green highlights.
description_view_3: The trunk's curve is most pronounced, and the fronds are viewed from above, emphasizing their feathery texture and radial symmetry.
attribute_husk_pattern: No coconut husk is visible; the surface texture consists of feathery, segmented fronds and a trunk with horizontal banding.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The object itself is a palm tree; no separate coconuts or additional palm trees are visible.
